title: 💬 One Update Thread, Multiple Boards

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Stay Updated Across All Your Boards with Unified Updates!

Body text (1)1032×1048 77.1 KB

Collaboration is a whole lot easier with Same Item in Multiple Boards Unified Updates feature!

Imagine all the updates from multiple boards coming together in one place—on the same item. No more scattered information or missed communications. Now, every update, whether it’s from your marketing, sales, or product board, will appear on the same item across all boards.

Here’s how different teams can benefit:

  1. Sales Teams: Keep track of customer interactions across multiple boards without losing context. Every update on a deal or client is now visible in one thread.

  2. Marketing Teams: Share campaign results or creative assets across different boards, and ensure every update is accessible to all stakeholders.

  3. Product Teams: Manage tasks across various projects and boards while keeping all team members in sync with every change or new update.

Want to give it a try? Install Same Item Multiple Boards - the free plan comes with unlimited updates!
